rows.label: tlk43700142_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Well, well, well! Have I got a beaut
of a drink for you! I served the high
court, so I know my stuff!

rows.label: tlk43700142_01_msg0002
rows.name:
In fact, I'll give you a
full refund if you can keep
a straight face! Gahaha!

rows.label: tlk43700142_01_msg0005
rows.name:
Good to see you, owner! As ever, I
provide only the most exquisite drinks,
based on my days at the high court!
